privileged_info_summary: Task operates on SYNTHETIC patient data generated with fabricated French names (DUPONT, MARTIN, DURAND, LEROY, MOREAU), fake addresses, and test phone numbers. The task teaches pseudonymization of a medical records database (MedinTux v2.16.012) by creating a copy and masking personal identifiers: names in IndexNomPrenom.FchGnrl_NomDos and IndexNomPrenom.FchGnrl_Prenom are masked to 'ANONYMOUS' and 'Subject'; contact fields in fchpat (FchPat_NomFille, FchPat_Adresse, FchPat_Tel1, FchPat_Tel2, FchPat_NumSS) are cleared. Demographic fields (date of birth, sex, zip code, city) are preserved for research purposes. The operation uses MySQL database with no real patient data.
